message:
docs(FEATURE_PARITY): Update tracking for themes, extensions, CLI flags, and issue references

Resources & Customization section:
- Update themes discovery from ❌ to 🔶: loader and global/project discovery
  now implemented in src/theme.rs; apply/switch tracked in bd-22p
- Note themes hot reload deferred until switching is wired

Extensions Runtime section:
- Add bead issue references for all blocked/partial features:
  - Extension discovery: bd-1e0
  - PiJS runtime and blocked APIs: bd-btq
  - Hostcall ABI spec: bd-37z
  - Capability manifest modes/audit: bd-34f

TUI Commands section:
- Add issue references for partial commands:
  - /login refresh tests: bd-3pn
  - /resume and /new in-app UX: bd-14cc
  - /copy clipboard parity: bd-28uy (workstream bd-1u0c)
  - /scoped-models UI/persistence: bd-27a8 (cycling bd-21gp)
  - /settings UI parity: bd-axuu
  - /share gist upload: bd-1kza (workstream bd-1u0c)
  - /reload autocomplete/diagnostics: bd-3nix

Authentication section:
- Reference bd-3pn for OAuth refresh tests

Test Coverage section:
- Add CLI flags row: 17 fixture-based tests now passing
- Update total from 198 to 215 tests
- Simplify "All tests pass" note

Fixture Coverage section:
- Add CLI flags entry: cli_flags.json with 17 cases
- Update total from 8/11 to 9/11 suites

SSE parsing note:
- Update location to reference asupersync HTTP client migration

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
